category_sources: source_facts.description says passive OS fingerprinting and masquerade detection; official p0f homepage describes passive traffic fingerprinting.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is p0f; official homepage heading is p0f v3.
docs_sources: Official p0f homepage is the primary official documentation surface and includes overview, capabilities, releases, and contact details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official p0f homepage and release source archive identify release tarballs but no official source-control repository was found. Mirrors and distro repositories were rejected.
